title: Spoke-Local Expediter — lug quality scoring + signal triage as framework-distributed advisor
signal: The hub Expediter's lug quality scoring (0-10 PEV rubric) and signal triage are universally valuable, not hub-specific. First spoke-local run revealed avg 4.4/10 quality across active lugs and 4 of 6 signals as teaching candidates. Gardener Tender now runs the scorer pre-Pass-2 on every active spoke, gating execution on quality. This transforms the tender from 'execute anything marked ready' to 'execute only what's actually ready.'
rationale: Every spoke has lugs the Gardener Tender tries to execute. Without quality scoring, the tender wastes tokens on vague lugs that fail. The Expediter catches this before dispatch — 3 lugs at 0/10 would have been attempted and failed without it. Signal triage identifies teaching candidates that would otherwise stay as raw observations indefinitely.
